arxiv.title: Beyond Scalar Rewards by Internalizing Reasoning into Score Distributions

arxiv.title: Stage-1 Controls the Entropy Regime, Not the Outcome

arxiv.title: EPS3D: End-to-End Feed-Forward 3D Panoptic Segmentation
arxiv.summary: This paper introduces EPS3D, a new end-to-end feed-forward framework for open-vocabulary 3D panoptic segmentation.
